title: Twist Bioscience Reports Fiscal Third Quarter 2024 Financial Results
text: Twist Bioscience Corporation announced its fiscal third quarter 2024 financial results, highlighting record revenue of $81.5 million, representing a 28% increase from $63.7 million in the same period last year. The company achieved significant margin expansion, with gross margin improving to 43.3%, up approximately 900 basis points from 34.4% year-over-year. CEO Emily M. Leproust stated: We once again surpassed our revenue guidance, ending the quarter with $81.5 million in revenue. Orders reached $85.3 million compared to $63.8 million previously. Revenue segments showed strong performance: SynBio grew to $33.0 million, NGS increased to $43.4 million, and Biopharma reached $5.1 million. Operating expenses included research and development costs of $22.5 million and selling, general and administrative expenses of $56.8 million. The company reported a net loss of $85.6 million, or $1.47 per share, though this included a $45 million impairment charge related to Biopharma assets. As of June 30, 2024, Twist maintained $289.4 million in cash and investments. The company updated full-year fiscal 2024 guidance, projecting total revenue of approximately $310-$311 million with gross margin at approximately 42%. For Q4 2024, management guided for revenue of $82-$83 million and an adjusted EBITDA loss of $20 million. The company shipped products to approximately 2,300 customers and delivered 212,000 genes during the quarter.
